header.runEvalsTooltip: Run the skill's evals against the in-progress fix copy
header.discardTooltip: Abandon this fix session — discard all temp changes

syncTooltip.create: Create the skill — copy the temp workdir into the skill directory
syncTooltip.fix: Sync the temp workdir back to the real skill directory

prompts.syncCreate: Create the skill "{{name}}" from the current temp workdir? This copies every file produced by the agent into the new skill directory.
prompts.syncFix: Sync the current fix changes to the real skill "{{name}}"? This copies the temp workdir onto the real skill directory.
prompts.discardCreate: Discard this create session? The draft skill will be lost.
prompts.discardFix: Discard this fix session? All changes in the temp workdir will be lost.

input.waitingCreate: Reply to the agent, then click "Create skill" when the draft is ready or "Discard" to abandon.
input.waitingFix: Reply to iterate, Run evals to validate, then Sync to skill or Discard
input.placeholderRunning: Wait for the agent to finish the current turn...
input.placeholderIdle: Type your response... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)

draftFiles.heading: Draft files ({{count}})
draftFiles.hintPreview: — click to preview what will be written
draftFiles.ipcErrorHint: The main process likely needs a restart — quit and relaunch the app.
draftFiles.emptyList: No files written yet. Poll refreshes every 3s while the panel is open.
draftFiles.missing: File no longer exists. The agent may have moved or deleted it.

review.emptyFix: No changes yet — the agent hasn't written anything different from the real skill.
review.emptyCreate: No files produced yet — the agent hasn't written anything in the workdir.
review.binaryNotice: Binary file — diff cannot be displayed.
review.pickFile: Select a file to view the diff.
